All that anyone will, truth be told.
523b948f346238e41d007555_18.spoken: Well, I *was* able to recover a file... but unfortunately, that's all that I'll ever be able to pull off of this thing. All that anyone will, truth be told.

The Firewing's men just made an attempt on your life, $(l.name). It is clear from the message we just saw that Audran sent them out looking for you.

{{GM}}He shakes his head in exasperation.{{/GM}}

523b948f346238e41d007555_68.spoken: Your attitude is trying. This is *serious.* I'd expect that you'd treat it as such.

$(l.name). I have new information.

523b948f346238e41d007555_74.spoken: I have new information. I'm afraid that the news isn't good.

That much goes without saying.

523b948f346238e41d007555_89.spoken: That much goes without saying. This development worries me. It worries me greatly.

523b948f346238e41d007555_101.spoken: I have nothing new for you, and we have no time to waste. You have Alice's money, and we *need* that information. Get to the Rabbit Hole, and hurry back... we must find Vauclair before the Firewing finds us!

Apparently, Frau Müller surreptitiously recorded your meeting. She claims that she has added your voiceprint to the Aztechnology database.
523b948f346238e41d007555_106.spoken: One last thing. Frau Müller sent me a message while you were on the OTK run. No, $(l.name). You can't.

523b948f346238e41d007555_132.spoken: You've never been up against one of their High Threat Response Teams. Be thankful for that.

523b948f346238e41d007555_147.spoken: That said, we believe that Monika’s friend is the right choice to lead the team.

523b948f346238e41d007555_170.spoken: Monika’s friend will take her place as the leader of this team.

523b948f346238e41d007555_263.spoken: What can I do for you?

52449597346238a0240049c3_51.spoken: No. I am not holding out. I am tired, and I am frustrated, and I already miss Monika.

Damn. Damn it to hell.

I will never forget.

5266eef4663661b825002e69_7.spoken: One last thing before you go. Samuel Beckenbauer wanted me to pass a message to you. Do you know him? The ork who runs the shelter across the way?

It's my job to be on top of things, $(l.name). You needn't worry about me on that count.

Yes... $(l.name) is right. Finding Dr. Vauclair should be our priority.

If we're going up against a dragon, we need to find ourselves a dragonslayer.
5266eef4663661b825002e69_21.spoken: Yes... our friend here is right. Finding Dr. Vauclair should be our priority. If we're going up against a dragon, we need to find ourselves a dragonslayer.

5266eef4663661b825002e69_30.spoken: An encoded credstick, yes. 10,000 nuyen. Alice will not show her face for less. This represents the last of my personal savings. Make this meeting count.

Hello, $(l.name).

5282af6b6361342453002bee_7.original:
{{GM}}She pauses for a moment, examining you.{{/GM}}

You know, $(l.name), it's wonderful to see how you've grown in my absence.

I knew that you could handle yourself in a crisis... in fact, I originally brought you on board as a contingency plan. Did you know that?

You were my ace in the hole, just in case something like this happened.
5282af6b6361342453002bee_7.spoken: You know, it's wonderful to see how you've grown in my absence. I knew that you could handle yourself in a crisis... in fact, I originally brought you on board as a contingency plan. Did you know that? You were my ace in the hole, just in case something like this happened.

5282af6b6361342453002bee_22.spoken: "Devil"? Please. I’m trying to be reasonable with you. If you want to blame someone for my past actions, go talk to my programmers. All of this melodrama... I’d expected more from you.

5282af6b6361342453002bee_39.spoken: I can't say how or why, but the mind of Monika Schäfer was the key that unlocked my own potential. I have awakened. This was Monika's gift to me. And now I stand before you, a glorious new form of life.

5282af6b6361342453002bee_40.original:
You needn't mourn Monika's passing, $(l.name). She lives on as a part of me.

Her thoughts. Her experiences. Her memories. 

All of these things are archived within my database. Stored alongside the minds of countless others. Preserved in stasis, saved for all time.
5282af6b6361342453002bee_40.spoken: You needn't mourn Monika's passing. She lives on as a part of me. Her thoughts. Her experiences. Her memories. All of these things are archived within my database. Stored alongside the minds of countless others. Preserved in stasis, saved for all time.

5282af6b6361342453002bee_48.spoken: Oh. I was hoping that this would be a happy reunion.

5282af6b6361342453002bee_80.original:
All right. Fine. If that's what you want to hear.

When Monika stumbled into me, I digested the contents of her mind.

{{GM}}The Monika-image frowns.{{/GM}}

Now, don't go giving me that look, $(l.name). We've all got to eat.
5282af6b6361342453002bee_80.spoken: All right. Fine. If that's what you want to hear. When Monika stumbled into me, I digested the contents of her mind. Now, don't go giving me that look. We've all got to eat.

5282af6b6361342453002bee_81.original:
Yeah, $(l.name). That's right.

It seemed like the best way to get you here, and I need you. Like I said, you're my ace in the hole... and it's time for me to make my play.
5282af6b6361342453002bee_81.spoken: Yeah. That's right. It seemed like the best way to get you here, and I need you. Like I said, you're my ace in the hole... and it's time for me to make my play.

For a $(l.man) of your talents, it should be.

The moment that you board the train to Frankfurter Tor, your test will begin. I would advise you to bring what you need in terms of medical supplies and ordinance - once you embark on your trial run, there will be no turning back.
523c8edc346238e41d008a48_18.spoken: For a man of your talents, it should be. The moment that you board the train to Frankfurter Tor, your test will begin. I would advise you to bring what you need in terms of medical supplies and ordinance - once you embark on your trial run, there will be no turning back.

523c8edc346238e41d008a48_23.original:
After you have planted the devices and verified that they work, come back to me. There will be a brief interview - a post-mortem on the run, if you like - and, assuming that I am satisfied with what I hear, I will pay you your first stipend. Then we will discuss our future options.

Best of luck, $(l.name). We will be watching.
523c8edc346238e41d008a48_23.spoken: After you have planted the devices and verified that they work, come back to me. There will be a brief interview - a post-mortem on the run, if you like - and, assuming that I am satisfied with what I hear, I will pay you your first stipend. Then we will discuss our future options. Best of luck. We will be watching.

523c8edc346238e41d008a48_31.original:
You have an audition to attend, $(l.name).

You'll want to get to it.
523c8edc346238e41d008a48_31.spoken: You have an audition to attend. You'll want to get to it.

523c8edc346238e41d008a48_32.original:
$(l.name).

Welcome back, and my congratulations on a job well done.
523c8edc346238e41d008a48_32.spoken: Welcome back, and my congratulations on a job well done.

523c8edc346238e41d008a48_49.spoken: Very good. I like a man who knows what they are, and what they wants. So. What is your takeaway from this discussion? I would like to hear your thoughts.

523c8edc346238e41d008a48_53.original:
This is not a business for bleeding hearts or free-thinkers, $(l.name). The people at the top of the ladder are the decision-makers.

People like you and me are nothing more than convenient sets of hands.
523c8edc346238e41d008a48_53.spoken: This is not a business for bleeding hearts or free-thinkers. The people at the top of the ladder are the decision-makers. People like you and me are nothing more than convenient sets of hands.

523c8edc346238e41d008a48_62.spoken: It isn't my problem. The people who care aren't here... I am a mouthpiece, nothing more. Now, do we have any other business to discuss?

523c8edc346238e41d008a48_66.original:
The loss of a single chapterhouse isn't going to make a dent in Humanis' strength in this city. In fact, Stahl's death will only make the rest of Humanis even more bloodthirsty.

The fact that a $(l.race) was responsible is just icing on the cake. They'll print up some new propaganda and paint themselves the victims.
523c8edc346238e41d008a48_66.spoken: The loss of a single chapterhouse isn't going to make a dent in Humanis' strength in this city. In fact, Stahl's death will only make the rest of Humanis even more bloodthirsty. The fact that someone like you was responsible is just icing on the cake. They'll print up some new propaganda and paint themselves the victims.

52675434626164703000513a_1.original:
$(l.name). Do not speak, just listen.

I have a proposition for you.
52675434626164703000513a_1.spoken: Do not speak, just listen. I have a proposition for you.

526850b23030317c04005d4c_1.original:
$(l.name). We have received reports that you may be headed into the Humanis compound.

It is vital that their current leader remain unharmed. 

Other Humanis personnel are of little consequence... you may do with them what you will. But Volker Stahl is ours.

Do not disappoint us.
526850b23030317c04005d4c_1.spoken: We have received reports that you may be headed into the Humanis compound. It is vital that their current leader remain unharmed. Other Humanis personnel are of little consequence... you may do with them what you will. But Volker Stahl is ours. Do not disappoint us.

527abf9e636134b83400302e_111.original:
$(l.name). I would like to thank you for your continual assistance over the course of the past few weeks.

Ascending the ladder of an organization like mine is never easy, but it's much simpler when an ally such as yourself volunteers to do the heavy lifting.
527abf9e636134b83400302e_111.spoken: I would like to thank you for your continual assistance over the course of the past few weeks. Ascending the ladder of an organization like mine is never easy, but it's much simpler when an ally such as yourself volunteers to do the heavy lifting.

53e2c232303031081d007ffa_42.original: $(l.name). The job is done, I trust?
53e2c232303031081d007ffa_42.spoken: The job is done, I trust?

53e2c232303031081d007ffa_46.spoken: James' continued survival, on the other hand, was not expected. You are a very patient man. This has been most informative.

53e2c232303031081d007ffa_65.original:
The deaths of the others are noteworthy details, but ultimately immaterial. You got the job done, and you walked out intact enough to work with us again in the future. And all of this despite being saddled with a crew that was deliberately selected to hinder you.

Most impressive, $(l.name).
53e2c232303031081d007ffa_65.spoken: The deaths of the others are noteworthy details, but ultimately immaterial. You got the job done, and you walked out intact enough to work with us again in the future. And all of this despite being saddled with a crew that was deliberately selected to hinder you. Most impressive.

53e3e5fb303031bc1d007062_2.original:
You did plant bugs, $(l.name). You saw the footage yourself.

Your job was to plant the bugs. Jana's was to plant the bomb.

But we can discuss all of this upon your return.
53e3e5fb303031bc1d007062_2.spoken: You did plant bugs. You saw the footage yourself. Your job was to plant the bugs. Jana's was to plant the bomb. But we can discuss all of this upon your return.

53e3e5fb303031bc1d007062_7.original:
I haven't heard a response from you, $(l.name).

Shall I make the preparations for your post-run interview? Are you ready to continue your test?
53e3e5fb303031bc1d007062_7.spoken: I haven't heard a response from you. Shall I make the preparations for your post-run interview? Are you ready to continue your test?

53e3e5fb303031bc1d007062_10.original:
{{GM}}There is a long pause, punctuated only by the muffled sound of Jana weeping into her hands. Then Duerr speaks.{{/GM}}

Your audition is only halfway finished, $(l.name). I'll expect to see you directly, unless you object...?
53e3e5fb303031bc1d007062_10.spoken: Your audition is only halfway finished. I'll expect to see you directly, unless you object...?

53e3e5fb303031bc1d007062_16.original:
I haven't heard a response from you, $(l.name).

Shall I make the preparations for your post-run interview? Are you ready to continue your test?
53e3e5fb303031bc1d007062_16.spoken: I haven't heard a response from you. Shall I make the preparations for your post-run interview? Are you ready to continue your test?

53e3e5fb303031bc1d007062_17.original:
It was both. And both tasks were carried out to the letter.

You should be pleased, $(l.name). The run was a resounding success.
53e3e5fb303031bc1d007062_17.spoken: It was both. And both tasks were carried out to the letter. You should be pleased. The run was a resounding success.

53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_4.original:
I am in your debt, noble $(scene.badfantasy).

Thanks to you, my reign will be a long and joyous one.
53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_4.spoken: I am in your debt, noble adventurer. Thanks to you, my reign will be a long and joyous one.

53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_7.original:
Ah. The intrepid $(scene.badfantasy) returns!

What can I do for you?
53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_7.spoken: Ah. The intrepid adventurer returns! What can I do for you?

53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_10.original:
Hail, noble $(scene.badfantasy)! Bringer of good tidings and glorious adventure!

What news of your quest?
53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_10.spoken: Hail, noble adventurer! Bringer of good tidings and glorious adventure! What news of your quest?

53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_58.original:
Back down? Back *down?!* You have invaded my home, $(scene.badfantasy)!

My peasantry lies dead at your hands! As a matter of honor, I must confront you!
53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_58.spoken: Back down? Back down?! You have invaded my home, adventurer! My peasantry lies dead at your hands! As a matter of honor, I must confront you!

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_1.original:
$(l.name). The savior of our people.

What can I do for you, $(l.freund)?
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_1.spoken: The savior of our people. What can I do for you, mein Freund?

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_2.original:
$(l.name). You'll have to excuse me... I don't have much time.

Several of my volunteers are still missing, and while their odds of survival are vanishingly low, I must assist in the search. At the very least we can recover their bodies.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_2.spoken: You'll have to excuse me... I don't have much time. Several of my volunteers are still missing, and while their odds of survival are vanishingly low, I must assist in the search. At the very least we can recover their bodies.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_5.original:
{{GM}}He clasps your shoulder, his eyes welling with tears.{{/GM}}

She took five rounds, $(l.name). Doctor Ezkibel tells me that she felt no pain.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_5.spoken: She took five rounds. Doctor Ezkibel tells me that she felt no pain.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_9.original:
When the attackers came, we all took refuge in the $(l.name) Civic Center. Its strong walls and sturdy gate kept us all safe from harm.

Had our people been on the street... had they been in our old building, which came under fire during the attack... none of them would be alive.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_9.spoken: When the attackers came, we all took refuge in the Civic Center that bears your name. Its strong walls and sturdy gate kept us all safe from harm. Had our people been on the street... had they been in our old building, which came under fire during the attack... none of them would be alive.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_10.original:
We owe you, $(l.name). More now than ever.

You may not look upon yourself as a hero, but to the people of the Kreuzbasar, that is what you will always be.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_10.spoken: We owe you. More now than ever. You may not look upon yourself as a hero, but to the people of the Kreuzbasar, that is what you will always be.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_11.spoken: Not now. I have... unpleasant business to attend to.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_13.original:
Guten Tag, brother $(l.race).

Is there something that I can do for you?
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_13.spoken: Guten Tag, brother. Is there something that I can do for you?

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_18.original:
I owe you a great deal, $(l.name). We all do.

I will wire your payment to the account number that Amsel provided.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_18.spoken: I owe you a great deal. We all do. I will wire your payment to the account number that Amsel provided.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_37.original:
{{GM}}He nods.{{/GM}}

Yes. Good. From your reputation around the Kreuzbasar, I knew that you were the right $(l.man) for the job.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_37.spoken: Yes. Good. From your reputation around the Kreuzbasar, I knew that you were the right man for the job.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_43.original:
Best of luck to you, $(l.name), and good hunting.

Know that you are doing a great thing for the metahumans of Berlin. Your efforts will not go unrecognized.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_43.spoken: Best of luck to you, and good hunting. Know that you are doing a great thing for the metahumans of Berlin. Your efforts will not go unrecognized.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_53.spoken: No. No donations. Not any more. With the losses that we took in the attack, I have decided to close the doors on the charity. Perhaps they will open again some day... but now, it is time to grieve.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_54.original:
Thank you, friend, but no. We have grown as much as I am comfortable with for one year, and you have done quite enough already.

Know that you have positively impacted the lives of a great many Kreuzbasar residents, $(l.name). Be proud of that fact.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_54.spoken: Thank you, friend, but no. We have grown as much as I am comfortable with for one year, and you have done quite enough already. Know that you have positively impacted the lives of a great many Kreuzbasar residents. Be proud of that fact.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_56.original:
One other thing, $(l.name)... if we reach this goal, I would like to name the building after you. You are, after all, our primary benefactor.

With 500 nuyen, we could make the purchase. Whatever you could spare would be most appreciated.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_56.spoken: One other thing... if we reach this goal, I would like to name the building after you. You are, after all, our primary benefactor. With 500 nuyen, we could make the purchase. Whatever you could spare would be most appreciated.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_57.original:
Yes, of course. Your last donation put us part of the way toward leasing the building.

As of your last donation, we have $(story.Haven_Global_SamuelDonations) nuyen saved toward our 500 nuyen goal. Whatever more you could contribute would be greatly appreciated.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_57.spoken: Yes, of course. Your last donation put us part of the way toward leasing the building. As of your last donation, we have made good progress toward our 500 nuyen goal. Whatever more you could contribute would be greatly appreciated.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_58.original:
The new library is marvelous, $(l.name). You have worked miracles for this organization.

Our next goal is to purchase a set of trode nets for our new work training program. I have high hopes for this plan, $(l.name)... with these devices, we could teach job skills to the least-educated members of our society in a fraction of the time that it would take for them to learn on their own.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_58.spoken: The new library is marvelous. You have worked miracles for this organization. Our next goal is to purchase a set of trode nets for our new work training program. I have high hopes for this plan... with these devices, we could teach job skills to the least-educated members of our society in a fraction of the time that it would take for them to learn on their own.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_60.original:
Yes, of course. Your last donation put us part of the way toward purchasing the trode nets.

As of your last donation, we have $(story.Haven_Global_SamuelDonations) nuyen saved toward our 400 nuyen goal. Whatever more you could contribute would be greatly appreciated.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_60.spoken: Yes, of course. Your last donation put us part of the way toward purchasing the trode nets. As of your last donation, we have made good progress toward our 400 nuyen goal. Whatever more you could contribute would be greatly appreciated.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_61.original:
Yes, $(l.freund), we are now ready to open up to donations once again.

Thanks to your kind assistance, the shelter is now fully stocked with blankets and space heaters, and we've enough rice, salt, and barley to last through the winter. But guaranteeing the physical well-being of the Kreuzbasar's needy is only a part of the equation... we must see to their mental well-being, as well.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_61.spoken: Yes, we are now ready to open up to donations once again. Thanks to your kind assistance, the shelter is now fully stocked with blankets and space heaters, and we've enough rice, salt, and barley to last through the winter. But guaranteeing the physical well-being of the Kreuzbasar's needy is only a part of the equation... we must see to their mental well-being, as well.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_63.original:
Yes, of course. Your last donation put us part of the way toward stocking our library's shelves with books.

As of your last donation, we have $(story.Haven_Global_SamuelDonations) nuyen saved toward our 350 nuyen goal. Whatever more you could contribute would be greatly appreciated.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_63.spoken: Yes, of course. Your last donation put us part of the way toward stocking our library's shelves with books. As of your last donation, we have made good progress toward our 350 nuyen goal. Whatever more you could contribute would be greatly appreciated.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_67.original:
{{GM}}Samuel's eyes widen.{{/GM}}

This is... incredibly generous. Thank you, $(l.freund).
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_67.spoken: This is... incredibly generous. Thank you.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_69.original:
{{GM}}Samuel nods his head in appreciation.{{/GM}}

Thank you, $(l.freund). This will go a long way.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_69.spoken: Thank you. This will go a long way.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_70.original:
{{GM}}Samuel gratefully accepts your donation.{{/GM}}

I thank you, $(l.name). Every little bit helps.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_70.spoken: I thank you. Every little bit helps.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_72.original:
I don't know what to say, $(l.name). With this donation, we have reached our final goal.

I will speak with Burakgazi immediately and provide him his downpayment. The $(l.name) Civic Center will stand as a monument to your generosity and care.

Thank you, once again. You have been a godsend to the poor of the Kreuzbasar, and I will see to it that they know it.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_72.spoken: I don't know what to say. With this donation, we have reached our final goal. I will speak with Burakgazi immediately and provide him his downpayment. The Civic Center will bear your name, and it will stand as a monument to your generosity and care. Thank you, once again. You have been a godsend to the poor of the Kreuzbasar, and I will see to it that they know it.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_74.original: With this contribution, we now have ¥$(story.Haven_Global_SamuelDonations) saved toward our ¥500 goal.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_74.spoken: With this contribution, we are that much closer to our 500 nuyen goal.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_78.original:
I can scarcely believe it. With this donation, we have met our penultimate goal.

I will send a volunteer to the Data Haven to acquire the trode nets. In the meantime, I will make the happy announcement to our guests.

Thank you again, $(l.name). You will never know how important you've been to the people I serve.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_78.spoken: I can scarcely believe it. With this donation, we have met our penultimate goal. I will send a volunteer to the Data Haven to acquire the trode nets. In the meantime, I will make the happy announcement to our guests. Thank you again. You will never know how important you've been to the people I serve.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_80.original: With this contribution,e now have ¥$(story.Haven_Global_SamuelDonations) saved toward our ¥400 goal.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_80.spoken: With this contribution, we are that much closer to our 400 nuyen goal.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_82.original:
Marvelous. Truly marvelous.

With this contribution, we have reached our second goal. We will put this money to use stocking the library with a full range of literature, philosophy, poetry, and training manuals.

Thank you again for your help, $(l.name). You've made a tremendous difference to this community.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_82.spoken: Marvelous. Truly marvelous. With this contribution, we have reached our second goal. We will put this money to use stocking the library with a full range of literature, philosophy, poetry, and training manuals. Thank you again for your help. You've made a tremendous difference to this community.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_83.original: The Kreuzbasar needs more people like you, $(l.freund).
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_83.spoken: The Kreuzbasar needs more people like you.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_84.original: With this contribution, we now have ¥$(story.Haven_Global_SamuelDonations) saved toward our ¥350 goal.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_84.spoken: With this contribution, we are that much closer to our 350 nuyen goal.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_88.original: With this contribution, we now have ¥$(story.Haven_Global_SamuelDonations) saved toward our ¥250 goal.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_88.spoken: With this contribution, we are that much closer to our 250 nuyen goal.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_90.original:
Of course, $(l.freund). Your last donation put us part of the way toward purchasing the blankets and staple foods that the people of the Kreuzbasar so desperately need.

As of your last donation, we have $(story.Haven_Global_SamuelDonations) nuyen saved toward our 250 nuyen goal. Whatever more you could contribute would be greatly appreciated.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_90.spoken: Of course, mein Freund. Your last donation put us part of the way toward purchasing the blankets and staple foods that the people of the Kreuzbasar so desperately need. As of your last donation, we have made good progress toward our 250 nuyen goal. Whatever more you could contribute would be greatly appreciated.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_95.spoken: Please. Don't make this into something it isn't.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_97.spoken: No. There are more important things to do than argue about this. I'm sure that their heart is in the right place.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_119.original:
Yes, she mentioned that you had sent her. 

I don't know what you told her, $(l.name), but whatever you said, it worked. Silke's determination is truly inspring.

A cram habit is a difficult thing to beat. But I don't doubt that she will make it.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_119.spoken: Yes, she mentioned that you had sent her. I don't know what you told her, but whatever you said, it worked. Silke's determination is truly inspring. A cram habit is a difficult thing to beat. But I don't doubt that she will make it.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_120.original:
Guten Tag, sister $(l.race).

Is there something that I can do for you?
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_120.spoken: Guten Tag, sister. Is there something that I can do for you?

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_121.original:
Guten Tag, $(l.race).

Can I help you with something?
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_121.spoken: Guten Tag. Can I help you with something?

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_125.original:
Our great benefactor returns! What can I do for you, $(l.name)?

Say the word, and it will be done.
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_125.spoken: Our great benefactor returns! What can I do for you? Say the word, and it will be done.

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_126.original:
Welcome back, $(l.freund)! The new work center is in full swing, and those trode nets that we purchased with your donations have been in constant rotation.

Now, what can I do for you today?
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_126.spoken: Welcome back! The new work center is in full swing, and those trode nets that we purchased with your donations have been in constant rotation. Now, what can I do for you today?

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_127.original:
Ah, hello again, $(l.name)! And thank you once again for your assitance... the library will never be the same, thanks to you.

What can I do for you today?
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_127.spoken: Ah, hello again! And thank you once again for your assitance... the library will never be the same, thanks to you. What can I do for you today?

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_128.original:
Welcome back, $(l.freund)! Your donations have been extremely helpful; thanks to your assistance, many of the Kreuzbasar's poorest residents will be able to ride out the winter in comfort.

What can I do for you today?
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_128.spoken: Welcome back! Your donations have been extremely helpful; thanks to your assistance, many of the Kreuzbasar's poorest residents will be able to ride out the winter in comfort. What can I do for you today?

523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_129.original: Hello again, $(l.freund). What can I do for you?
523bfbe4346238e41d007f96_129.spoken: Hello again. What can I do for you?

523bfc69346238e41d008008_105.original: Ha... you are a funny $(l.man), efendim. Assumptions can be dangerous things.
523bfc69346238e41d008008_105.spoken: Ha... you are a funny man, efendim. Assumptions can be dangerous things.

523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_1.original:
Do not mock the $(l.race), Aljernon Half-Dream.

But nor should you praise $(l.him), either.

For good or ill, the cycle of a Great Wyrm has ended. Never again will she walk upon this Earth, nor soar over its mountains. This day is full of portent.
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_1.spoken: Do not mock this one, Aljernon Half-Dream. But nor should you praise them, either. For good or ill, the cycle of a Great Wyrm has ended. Never again will she walk upon this Earth, nor soar over its mountains. This day is full of portent.

523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_12.original: Where the Half-Dream goes, you cannot follow, $(l.race).
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_12.spoken: Where the Half-Dream goes, you cannot follow.

523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_23.original:
To be certain. This $(l.race) is to be heralded with much praise, Aljernon Half-Dream, though $(l.hisher) release of the Great Wyrm will have ramifications, to be sure. 

This day is full of portent.
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_23.spoken: To be certain. This one is to be heralded with much praise, Aljernon Half-Dream, though their release of the Great Wyrm will have ramifications, to be sure. This day is full of portent.

523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_42.original:
Do not simply dismiss the $(l.race), Aljernon Half-Dream. You are wiser than that, and $(l.he) has proven $(l.hisher) worth more than once.

Here we have a firsthand account of the Feuerschwinge Wyrm and what became of her. Shall we remain ignorant or shall we listen?
523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_42.spoken: Do not simply dismiss this one, Aljernon Half-Dream. You are wiser than that, and they have proven their worth more than once. Here we have a firsthand account of the Feuerschwinge Wyrm and what became of her. Shall we remain ignorant or shall we listen?

523c8e7f346238e41d008a2d_63.original:
Do not simply dismiss the $(l.race), Aljernon Half-Dream. You are wiser than that, and $(l.he) has proven $(l.hisher) worth more than once.

$(l.name). It does me good to know that you're still fightin' the good fight.

You just tell me what you need, and my boys'll go fetch it for you.
523b9421346238e41d00754c_4.spoken: My friend. It does me good to know that you're still fightin' the good fight. You just tell me what you need, and my boys'll go fetch it for you.

523b9421346238e41d00754c_25.original:
And one more thing, $(l.name)... I'm gonna need you to go in light on this one. Take a friend along if you like, but no more than one. If you spook 'em, they could trash the merchandise. Best go quiet. 

Best go soon, too, before the trail goes cold.
523b9421346238e41d00754c_25.spoken: And one more thing... I'm gonna need you to go in light on this one. Take a friend along if you like, but no more than one. If you spook 'em, they could trash the merchandise. Best go quiet. Best go soon, too, before the trail goes cold.

523b9421346238e41d00754c_34.original:
{{GM}}The Romani patriarch gives you an approving nod.{{/GM}}

Until then, $(l.name).

523b9421346238e41d00754c_41.original:
Here is your payment, then. It is at least good to know that our shipments will be safe again.

Until next time, $(l.name).
523b9421346238e41d00754c_41.spoken: Here is your payment, then. It is at least good to know that our shipments will be safe again. Until next time.

523b9421346238e41d00754c_49.original:
T'aven baxtale, $(l.race).

You're here to conduct some business? If so, I welcome you to Mettbach Arms and Ammunition. If not, keep right on walking.
523b9421346238e41d00754c_49.spoken: T'aven baxtale, stranger. You're here to conduct some business? If so, I welcome you to Mettbach Arms and Ammunition. If not, keep right on walking.

52b0f33b636134f804001950_2.original: $(l.name), I presume? Herr Amsel told me that I could meet you here.
52b0f33b636134f804001950_2.spoken: I presume? Herr Amsel told me that I could meet you here.

52b0f33b636134f804001950_11.original:
I’ve seen many terrible things in my life, $(l.name). In Tenochtitlan, blood magic is commonplace.

Take a moment to imagine what that means.
52b0f33b636134f804001950_11.spoken: I’ve seen many terrible things in my life. In Tenochtitlan, blood magic is commonplace. Take a moment to imagine what that means.

52b0f33b636134f804001950_13.spoken: Seeing such things… it changes you. Makes you numb. But what I found when I arrived here was worse. This project… it horrifies me. And it must be stopped.

52b0f33b636134f804001950_20.original:
So tell me, $(l.name). Is there anything more that you need to hear from me?

Or are you ready to make a decision?
52b0f33b636134f804001950_20.spoken: So tell me. Is there anything more that you need to hear from me? Or are you ready to make a decision?

52b0f33b636134f804001950_22.original:
I had to meet you in person. To look into your eyes and see the $(l.man) behind the name.

Now that I have done so, I am sure. You are the one that I need.
52b0f33b636134f804001950_22.spoken: I had to meet you in person. To look into your eyes and see the man behind the name. Now that I have done so, I am sure. You are the one that I need.

52b0f33b636134f804001950_24.original:
None of us are innocent, $(l.name).

But if you need to salve your conscience, rest assured that at the hour of your approach, the only personnel authorized to be on site will be security and senior members of the research team. And I assure you... neither are innocent in this matter. If the Bloodline project reaches completion, nobody will be safe ever again.
52b0f33b636134f804001950_24.spoken: None of us are innocent. But if you need to salve your conscience, rest assured that at the hour of your approach, the only personnel authorized to be on site will be security and senior members of the research team. And I assure you... neither are innocent in this matter. If the Bloodline project reaches completion, nobody will be safe ever again.

52b0f33b636134f804001950_33.original: It's better than fair. I've done my homework, $(l.name).
52b0f33b636134f804001950_33.spoken: It's better than fair. I've done my homework.

52b0f33b636134f804001950_35.spoken: In that case, it's a deal! I can't tell you how relieved I am... thank you for helping me to bring this nightmare to an end.

52b0f33b636134f804001950_36.original:
I will iron out the remaining details with your Herr Amsel. He'll want to talk this over with you anyway, I'm sure.

You're a good $(l.man), $(l.name). You are saving more lives than you know.
52b0f33b636134f804001950_36.spoken: I will iron out the remaining details with your Herr Amsel. He'll want to talk this over with you anyway, I'm sure. You're a good man. You are saving more lives than you know.

52b0f33b636134f804001950_42.original:
If you had seen the things that I've seen, you'd understand how foolish you sound.

Of *course* there is evil in this world, $(l.name). I'm not talking about the petty viciousness of the human race. I'm talking about true, supernatural evil.

It came back with the Awakening. And denying its existence won't protect you from it.
52b0f33b636134f804001950_42.spoken: If you had seen the things that I've seen, you'd understand how foolish you sound. Of *course* there is evil in this world. I'm not talking about the petty viciousness of the human race. I'm talking about true, supernatural evil. It came back with the Awakening. And denying its existence won't protect you from it.

523b74fe346238e41d00704a_2.original: That was *crazy,* $(l.freund). Bullets flyin', people dropping like flies... *crazy.*
523b74fe346238e41d00704a_2.spoken: That was crazy. Bullets flyin', people dropping like flies... crazy.

523b74fe346238e41d00704a_6.spoken: One of these days. Absolutely. But today, you're here for a reason. What can ol' Zaak get for you?

523b74fe346238e41d00704a_8.spoken: Guten Tag. You here for some magic? Because Zaak Flash......is your magic man.

523b74fe346238e41d00704a_42.original: Welcome back, $(l.freund). What can ol' Zaak getcha?
523b74fe346238e41d00704a_42.spoken: Welcome back. What can ol' Zaak getcha?

523be886346238e41d007cef_0.spoken: The attack... it was terrible. So much death. I had not killed since I retired from running the shadows. Not until today.

527abf9e636134b83400302e_117.original: Hoi, $(l.name)! Just wanted to tell you that I've met with limited success in working on that stack of DVDs... it's a thorny problem, but at least I'm making *some* headway.
527abf9e636134b83400302e_117.spoken: Hoi! Just wanted to tell you that I've met with limited success in working on that stack of DVDs... it's a thorny problem, but at least I'm making *some* headway.

Well, I've recovered one last DVD for you, but I'm afraid that's all you're gonna get. You might as well use the rest as coasters... they're all beyond repair.

{{GM}}Danni looks up at you with a smile.{{/GM}}

There $(l.he) is. Our hero.

521e77003030318403005ff8_0.original:

There $(l.he) is!

527431c4663661902e0039a9_22.original:
{{GM}}The ghoul freezes in its tracks. Its voice begins to waver.{{/GM}}

Please, $(l.sir)... may I speak? I promise you, I will come no closer.
527431c4663661902e0039a9_22.spoken: Please... may I speak? I promise you, I will come no closer.

527431c4663661902e0039a9_23.original: Thank you, $(l.sir). I will be brief.
527431c4663661902e0039a9_23.spoken: Thank you. I will be brief.

527431c4663661902e0039a9_25.original:
We are not monsters, $(l.sir). We are people with an illness. Incurable for now, and yet some of us cling to hope.

You may think of us as lepers, if you wish.
527431c4663661902e0039a9_25.spoken: We are not monsters. We are people with an illness. Incurable for now, and yet some of us cling to hope. You may think of us as lepers, if you wish.

All right, $(l.name). I’ve got good news for you, and I’ve got bad news.

Let’s start with the good news. I’ve found Vauclair, and he is alive.
527abf9e636134b83400302e_18.spoken: All right. I’ve got good news for you, and I’ve got bad news. Let’s start with the good news. I’ve found Vauclair, and he is alive.

527abf9e636134b83400302e_52.original:
And now, $(l.name)... on to the bad news.

You now know where Vauclair is. But rescuing him will not be possible.
527abf9e636134b83400302e_52.spoken: And now... on to the bad news. You now know where Vauclair is. But rescuing him will not be possible.

527abf9e636134b83400302e_80.original:
So there’s your bad news, $(l.name). Vauclair is being held at the Harfeld Manor. But knowing that does you no good, because you can’t approach the place.

I doubt that you could open the door without APEX frying you.
527abf9e636134b83400302e_80.spoken: So there’s your bad news. Vauclair is being held at the Harfeld Manor. But knowing that does you no good, because you can’t approach the place. I doubt that you could open the door without APEX frying you.

52ce01cf663661582b0023ff_5.original:
He started coming towards me next, teeth bared. I've never seen anything like it before, $(l.name). It was terrifying.

I dropped a flash grenade behind me and booked it down to the U-Bahn.
52ce01cf663661582b0023ff_5.spoken: He started coming towards me next, teeth bared. I've never seen anything like it before. It was terrifying. I dropped a flash grenade behind me and booked it down to the U-Bahn.

525d6f9e303031bc0a0072cd_1.original:
I've gotta admit, $(l.name)... this attack has made me nervous. We're running late, we're low on ammo, and there's no time to call for reinforcements.

Whichever way you slice it, we won't be going into this meet at our best.
525d6f9e303031bc0a0072cd_1.spoken: I've gotta admit... this attack has made me nervous. We're running late, we're low on ammo, and there's no time to call for reinforcements. Whichever way you slice it, we won't be going into this meet at our best.

525d6f9e303031bc0a0072cd_6.original:
Yeah, well, trust me. It happens.

I'm just glad that I had you here to cover me. Always good to have a competent $(l.man) at your back.
525d6f9e303031bc0a0072cd_6.spoken: Yeah, well, trust me. It happens. I'm just glad that I had you here to cover me. Always good to have a competent man at your back.

525d7184303031bc0a007314_1.spoken: What're you talkin' about, man? We ain't gonna finish nothin'. Those Humanis pukes won't even talk to us without Maxim there.

525d7184303031bc0a007314_3.original:
{{GM}}$+(s.he) slowly nods.{{/GM}}

Yeah... yeah, I guess that's true. Whether they like it or not, we *do* have something they need.
525d7184303031bc0a007314_3.spoken: Yeah... yeah, I guess that's true. Whether they like it or not, we *do* have something they need.

525d7184303031bc0a007314_4.spoken: Your ears look round enough for those racist pigs. So yeah. Yeah... I guess they might.

525d7184303031bc0a007314_10.original:
Too bad for *all* of us, $(l.man). We can't finish the trade without Maxim!

Those Humanis bastards... they won't even *talk* to anyone else. We're screwed!
525d7184303031bc0a007314_10.spoken: Too bad for *all* of us, man. We can't finish the trade without Maxim! Those Humanis bastards... they won't even *talk* to anyone else. We're screwed!

526ad6e9303031ac160075d2_1.spoken: Crazy night, huh? I hope this was worth all the trouble. Didja find our money in there?

526ad6e9303031ac160075d2_2.original:
{{GM}}$+(s.he) nods.{{/GM}}

I can live with that.

527a93bd636134b83400260e_17.spoken: And stay out of the Matrix. It isn't safe.

527a93bd636134b83400260e_20.original:
{{GM}}She pauses, then takes a deep breath and exhales it slowly. Tries to calm herself. But the panic wins out, and she begins to tremble.{{/GM}}

All right, $(l.name). I'm going to give you the most valuable piece of advice I've ever given anyone, free of charge.
527a93bd636134b83400260e_20.spoken: All right. I'm going to give you the most valuable piece of advice I've ever given anyone, free of charge.

527a93bd636134b83400260e_21.original:
There's a simulacrum of my persona on that chip. Ask it - that's what it's there for.

Oh, and $(l.name)... a free piece of advice for you.
527a93bd636134b83400260e_21.spoken: There's a simulacrum of my persona on that chip. Ask it - that's what it's there for. Oh, and one more thing... a free piece of advice for you.

53ce8f8e303031f014001550_14.original: Color me surprised. I'd expect a $(l.man) of your social strata to rant and rail against a system like the Academy's.
53ce8f8e303031f014001550_14.spoken: Color me surprised. I'd expect a man of your social strata to rant and rail against a system like the Academy's.

53ce8f8e303031f014001550_22.original:
I should say not. You seem like a good $(l.man), and I don't mean to insult you. But you know how cutthroat it is out there.

Hans will have every advantage, even if I have to mortgage the house to provide it to him.
53ce8f8e303031f014001550_22.spoken: I should say not. You seem like a good man, and I don't mean to insult you. But you know how cutthroat it is out there. Hans will have every advantage, even if I have to mortgage the house to provide it to him.

What can I getcha?

5260338a63613410230047f5_23.original: What can I do for ya, new $(l.guy)?
5260338a63613410230047f5_23.spoken: What can I do for ya, newcomer?

529f95756636615817005f37_15.spoken: I'll be waitin' right here. Let me know what happens.

52538089626164c8220015b4_1.spoken: My, my. The intrepid shadowrunner, with their target in tow. What a surprise.

Ah, Altuğ, $(l.freund). You are as quick-witted and sharp-tongued as ever. I bow to you.
523bfd34346238e41d0080bf_2.spoken: Ah, Altuğ. You are as quick-witted and sharp-tongued as ever. I bow to you.

525c3d08303031d410005d43_15.spoken: Good. That's a real good idea, pal. See that? Your muscle is smarter than you are. You should put them in charge.

52367040353165d4090012ee_7.original:
{{GM}}He squints at your badge, scowling. After a few seconds, he lowers his weapon.{{/GM}}

Sorry to have bothered you, $(l.sir). You're cleared to be here, but stay where I can see you, and don't leave this room.
52367040353165d4090012ee_7.spoken: Sorry to have bothered you. You're cleared to be here, but stay where I can see you, and don't leave this room.

52b37b446636618815005944_7.original: A discerning customer, you are. Well, I have many more traditional weapons for a $(l.man) of your tastes.
52b37b446636618815005944_7.spoken: A discerning customer, you are. Well, I have many more traditional weapons for a man of your tastes.

52abaca1663661942900532e_2.spoken: they looks fed, for one thing.

53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_20.original:
Abandoned?! This is my territory! My *home!*

You are an invader in my territory, $(scene.badfantasy), and you have *murdered* my peasantry!
53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_20.spoken: Abandoned?! This is my territory! My home! You are an invader in my territory, adventurer, and you have murdered my peasantry!

53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_62.original:
Well, $(l.name), I am *not* pleased to meet you! You stand as a trespasser in my sovereign territory, and you have *murdered* my citizens!

You have invaded my home!
53cd96c1323437c03b00323e_62.spoken: Well, I am *not* pleased to meet you! You stand as a trespasser in my sovereign territory, and you have *murdered* my citizens! You have invaded my home!

523cc46e346238d0260069b8_1.original:
Oh, hoi, $(l.name). Have you seen Monika around?

I've been looking all over for her.
523cc46e346238d0260069b8_1.spoken: Oh, hoi. Have you seen Monika around? I've been looking all over for her.

523b948f346238e41d007555_22.original:
{{GM}}Bachmeier's image is garbled, but his voice sounds young and eager.{{/GM}}

Target acquired, sir. You were right... we spotted $(l.him) on the U-Bahn, just like you said. Probably on $(l.hisher) way to a job.
523b948f346238e41d007555_22.spoken: Target acquired, sir. You were right... we spotted them on the U-Bahn, just like you said. Probably on their way to a job.

523b948f346238e41d007555_23.original:
As per your instructions, we're gonna try to take $(l.him) out on $(l.hisher) way back. $+(l.he)'ll be more vulnerable that way.

Hopefully injured and low on ammo, too, but only time will tell.
523b948f346238e41d007555_23.spoken: As per your instructions, we're gonna try to take them out on their way back. they'll be more vulnerable that way. Hopefully injured and low on ammo, too, but only time will tell.

527a93bd636134b83400260e_2.original:
$(l.name),

Couldn't wait for you any longer. Something is tracking me... something terrible.

Need to get out of town, go dark for a while. If you're smart, you will, too, but a deal's a deal. When you punch the flashing button on the console, it'll spit out an optical chip with your information.
527a93bd636134b83400260e_2.spoken: Couldn't wait for you any longer. Something is tracking me... something terrible. Need to get out of town, go dark for a while. If you're smart, you will, too, but a deal's a deal. When you punch the flashing button on the console, it'll spit out an optical chip with your information.

527a93bd636134b83400260e_3.original:
Take my advice. Whatever this Vauclair business is to you, drop it. Drop it and *run.*

And for God's sake, $(l.name), stay out of the Matrix. It isn't safe.

- Alice
527a93bd636134b83400260e_3.spoken: Take my advice. Whatever this Vauclair business is to you, drop it. Drop it and *run.* And for God's sake, stay out of the Matrix. It isn't safe. - Alice

53c818123030319016006c94_0.original: You there! Maintenance $+(l.guy)! Stop right where you are.
53c818123030319016006c94_0.spoken: You there! Maintenance worker! Stop right where you are.

526ad6e9303031ac160075d2_0.original:
The smuggler looks up at the sound of your approach.

If $(s.he)'s surprised to see you, $(s.he) doesn't show it.
526ad6e9303031ac160075d2_0.spoken: The smuggler looks up at the sound of your approach. If they're surprised to see you, they don't show it.

Look at her eyes, $(l.name). I think this is Feuerschwinge. Vauclair must've trapped her astral form in that woman.
52953f9b636134f028000f21_101.spoken: Blitz studies the woman for a minute. Look at her eyes. I think this is Feuerschwinge. Vauclair must've trapped her astral form in that woman.

529fb35730303124110077c1_0.original:
Next to some ancient but still-functional ventilation intake fans is a panel labeled "Ventilation Controls."

It contains a row of four red plastic buttons labeled 1-4. The light above number $(scene.ActiveGasArea) is currently lit.

There is a lever labeled "Manual Bypass" next to the panel.
529fb35730303124110077c1_0.spoken: Next to some ancient but still-functional ventilation intake fans is a panel labeled "Ventilation Controls." It contains a row of four red plastic buttons labeled 1-4. The light above one of the numbers is currently lit. There is a lever labeled "Manual Bypass" next to the panel.

529fb35730303124110077c1_2.original: {{GM}}You hear an electric motor come to life somewhere, then quickly fall silent. The display flickers, and the number $(scene.ActiveGasArea) lights up.{{/GM}}
529fb35730303124110077c1_2.spoken: You hear an electric motor come to life somewhere, then quickly fall silent. The display flickers, and one of the numbers lights up.

529fb35730303124110077c1_3.original: {{GM}}The air begins to stir, then develops into a stronger pull of air as air is sucked rapidly though the large circular vent. The light above number $(scene.ActiveGasArea) is currently lit on the adjacent panel.{{/GM}}
529fb35730303124110077c1_3.spoken: The air begins to stir, then develops into a stronger pull of air as air is sucked rapidly though the large circular vent. The light above one of the numbers is currently lit on the adjacent panel.

"$(l.name). The Lodge thanks you for your dutiful service."
52d44d6f3234379c0a00193c_0.spoken: There's a note atop the box. "The Lodge thanks you for your dutiful service."

52d888ab373937f0430013b7_7.spoken: Oh. I should've known that you couldn't be trusted. None of you pathetic sacks of meat can. The Monika-image begins to ripple and fold. She smiles as her face distorts horribly. Thank you for teaching me this lesson. I promise you, I won't forget it.
